title: CGS celebrates National Vet Girls ROCK Day highlighting our own, Susan Thompson
summary: Susan Thompson, Dir. of Operations for Administrative Support This past weekend (Feb. 19) was National Vet Girls ROCK Day – a day established in 2017 to recognize the dedication of over two million female veterans. We thought there was no better way to celebrate than by highlighting one of our own recent veteran team members, Susan Thompson. Susan served 25 years in the U.S. Air Force and recently re...

title: Farm and Ranch Tours Showcase the Bounty of Alaska
summary: Farming in Alaska is growing, and from Interior to Southeast, farm owners are offering tours of their land and operation. The post Farm and Ranch Tours Showcase the Bounty of Alaska appeared first on Alaska Magazine .
